Biggest Companies By Market Cap.text: A list of stocks ranked by market capitalization, updated daily. It includes companies listed in the United States that are traded on the NASDAQ, NYSE and NYSE American. It does not include private companies or over-the-counter stocks.

U.S. Companies That Pay The Highest Taxe.text: These are the biggest public companies in the US, sorted by how much they paid in corporate income taxes in the past 12 months.

U.S. Companies With The Most Revenue.text: These are the biggest U.S. companies ranked by total revenue or sales over the past 12 months. It includes companies based in the United States that can be publicly traded on the stock exchange.

Stocks That Pay Monthly Dividends.text: This list includes all the stocks that pay dividends every month and are listed on the NASDAQ, NYSE or NYSE American in the U.S.

U.S. Companies With The Most Employees.text: These are the biggest U.S. companies ranked by the total number of employees, updated daily. These are companies based in the United States of America and listed on the stock exchange.

Top-Rated Dividend Stocks.text: This list shows the top rated dividend stocks according to stock analysts. Each stock on the list has an average "buy" or "strong buy" rating from at least 10 analysts. Each stock also has a dividend yield of at least 2% and a payout ratio under 60%, which indicates that the dividend is sustainable.

Mega-Cap Stocks.text: Mega-cap stocks are defined as having a market capitalization of $200 billion USD or higher. Other categories are Large-Cap, Mid-Cap, Small-Cap, Micro-Cap and Nano-Cap.

Large-Cap Stocks.text: Large-cap stocks are defined as having a market capitalization between $10 and $200 billion USD. Other categories are Mega-Cap, Mid-Cap, Small-Cap, Micro-Cap and Nano-Cap.

Mid-Cap Stocks.text: Mid-cap stocks are defined as having a market capitalization between $2 and $10 billion USD. Other categories are Mega-Cap, Large-Cap, Small-Cap, Micro-Cap and Nano-Cap.

Small-Cap Stocks.text: Small-cap stocks are defined as having a market capitalization between $300 million and $2 billion USD. Other categories are Mega-Cap, Large-Cap, Mid-Cap, Micro-Cap and Nano-Cap.

Micro-Cap Stocks.text: Micro-cap stocks are defined as having a market capitalization between $50 and $300 million USD. Other categories are Mega-Cap, Large-Cap, Mid-Cap, Small-Cap and Nano-Cap.

Nano-Cap Stocks.text: Nano-cap stocks are defined as having a market capitalization under $50 million USD. Other categories are Mega-Cap, Large-Cap, Mid-Cap, Small-Cap and Micro-Cap.

All Stocks Listed on the NASDAQ.text: A list of all the stocks that are currently listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange in the United States.

All Stocks Listed on the NYSE.text: All of the stocks listed on the NYSE (New York Stock Exchange) in the US.

Closed End Funds List.text: A list of all the actively traded closed end funds (CEFs) on the main stock exchanges in the U.S.

All Active REITs on the US Stock Market.text: These are all the actively traded REITs (Real Estate Investment Trusts) on the US stock market.

All Active SPACs on the US Stock Market.text: These are all the actively traded SPACs (Special Purpose Acquisition Companies) on the US stock market. These are also known as blank check companies or shell companies.

Dividend Aristocrats List.text: Dividend aristocrats are companies in the S&P500 index that have been raising their dividends every year for 25 or more years. This is a list of all the dividend aristocrats.

Dividend Kings List.text: Dividend kings are companies that have been raising their dividend payments every year for 50 or more years. This is a list of all the dividend kings on the US stock market.

Dow Jones Industrial Average Stocks List.text: A list of the 30 stocks in the Dow Jones Industrial Average stock index, which is an index of 30 major companies listed on stock exchanges in the U.S.

NASDAQ 100 Index Stocks List.text: A list of all the stocks in the NASDAQ 100 stock index, which is an index of the top 100 non-financial companies trading on the Nasdaq stock exchange in the U.S. There are a total of 100 companies but 101 stock tickers because Google-parent Alphabet has two separate symbols.

S&P 500 Index Stocks List.text: A list of all the stocks in the S&P 500 stock index, which is an index of the top 500 biggest companies listed on stock exchanges in the United States. There are a total of 500 companies but more than 500 stock tickers because several companies have more than one stock symbol.

Biggest Artificial Intelligence Stocks.text: This is a list of the top stocks that are directly involved with artificial intelligence (AI) and/or have significant exposure to the growth of AI technology.

Biggest Car Company Stocks.text: This is a list of the biggest car company and automaker stocks, ranked by market capitalization.

Biggest E-Sports Stocks.text: E-Sports stands for "Electronic Sports." It is a term for competition in video games, often over the internet but also via in-person events. Below is a list of stocks of companies involved in e-sports.

Biggest Gaming Stocks by Market Cap.text: The biggest gaming company stocks, ranked by market cap. This list includes stocks of companies who get a significant percentage of their revenue from video games or gaming-related products.

Biggest Metaverse Stocks.text: The metaverse is a concept for virtual environments that people can access through the internet, usually via augmented reality (AR) or virtual reality (VR) devices. Many companies are making huge investments in the metaverse, which is expected to become a big market in the future.

Biggest Social Media Stocks by Market Ca.text: This list includes stocks of companies who own social networks or have a significant percentage of their operations involved with social media

Canadian Companies on The US Stock Marke.text: A complete list of the Canadian companies that are listed on the US stock market. Most of them are also listed in Canada.

Chinese Companies on The US Stock Market.text: A complete list of the Chinese companies that are listed on the US stock market. Many of them are traded as American Depositary Receipts (ADRs) and are also listed on a stock exchange in China.

Indian Companies on The US Stock Market.text: A complete list of all the Indian companies that are listed on the stock market in the US. Most of them are also listed in India.

Irish Companies on The US Stock Market.text: A complete list of all the Irish companies that are listed on the stock market in the US. Many Irish stocks are also listed on Euronext Dublin, the stock exchange in Ireland.

Israeli Companies on The US Stock Market.text: A complete list of all the Israeli companies that are listed on the stock market in the US. Many of them are also listed in Israel on the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange.

British Companies on The US Stock Market.text: A complete list of all the British companies that are listed on the stock market in the US. Many of them are also listed in the United Kingdom on the London Stock Exchange.

All Stocks Listed on the NASDAQ.text: A list of all the stocks that are currently listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange in the United States.

All Stocks Listed on the NYSE.text: All of the stocks listed on the NYSE (New York Stock Exchange) in the US.

Toronto Stock Exchange Stocks.text: A list of actively traded stock ticker symbols on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX), which is the main stock exchange in Canada. The stocks are sorted by market cap and the list is updated daily. Company financials and stock prices are in Canadian dollars (CAD)

London Stock Exchange Stocks.text: A list of actively traded stock ticker symbols on the London Stock Exchange (LSE), which is the main stock exchange in the United Kingdom. The stocks are sorted by market cap and the list is updated daily. Company financials are in British pounds and stock prices are in British pence (0.01 GBP).

Australian Securities Exchange Stocks.text: A list of actively traded stock ticker symbols on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX), which is the main stock exchange in Australia. The stocks are sorted by market cap and the list is updated daily. Company financials and stock prices are in Australian dollars (AUD).

Nasdaq Iceland Stocks.text: A list of all actively traded stock symbols on Nasdaq Iceland, which is the stock exchange in Iceland. The stocks are sorted by market cap and the list is updated daily. Stock prices and company financials are in the ISK currency (Icelandic krona).

Euronext Dublin Stocks.text: A list of all the actively traded stock symbols on Euronext Dublin, which is the stock exchange in Ireland. The stocks are sorted by market cap and the list is updated daily. Currency is EUR. There are also many Irish companies listed on the U.S. stock market.
